Keywords: vpc, network, subnet, nat, igw, routing
Description: Complete VPC with subnets NAT gateways and routing
Input Variables: name, cidr, azs, private_subnets, public_subnets, enable_nat_gateway, single_nat_gateway
Use Cases: Production VPC, multi-AZ networking, public/private subnet architecture
Best Practices: Use at least 2 AZs, enable DNS, configure NAT for private subnets
Example Usage: module "vpc" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/vpc/aws" version = "5.0.0" name = "my-vpc" cidr = "10.0.0.0/16" azs = ["us-east-1a", "us-east-1b"] private_subnets = ["10.0.1.0/24", "10.0.2.0/24"] public_subnets = ["10.0.101.0/24", "10.0.102.0/24"] enable_nat_gateway = true }

Keywords: eks, kubernetes, k8s, cluster, managed, container
Description: Production-ready EKS cluster with managed node groups
Use Cases: Production Kubernetes, microservices, container workloads
Best Practices: Use managed node groups, enable IRSA, configure cluster logging
Example Usage: module "eks" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/eks/aws" version = "19.0.0" cluster_name = "my-cluster" cluster_version = "1.28" vpc_id = module.vpc.vpc_id subnet_ids = module.vpc.private_subnets eks_managed_node_groups = { default = { min_size = 1 max_size = 10 desired_size = 3 instance_types = ["t3.medium"] } } }

Keywords: rds, database, postgres, mysql, aurora, managed
Description: RDS instance or Aurora cluster with best practices
Input Variables: identifier, engine, engine_version, instance_class, allocated_storage, db_name, username, password, vpc_security_group_ids, subnet_ids
Use Cases: Managed databases, PostgreSQL, MySQL, production databases
Best Practices: Enable multi-AZ, encryption, automated backups, use parameter groups
Example Usage: module "rds" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/rds/aws" version = "6.0.0" identifier = "my-db" engine = "postgres" engine_version = "15" instance_class = "db.t3.micro" allocated_storage = 20 db_name = "mydb" username = "admin" password = var.db_password vpc_security_group_ids = [module.security_group.security_group_id] subnet_ids = module.vpc.database_subnets multi_az = true storage_encrypted = true }

Keywords: s3, bucket, storage, object, static, files
Description: S3 bucket with versioning encryption and policies
Use Cases: Static hosting, data lake, backup storage, artifact storage
Best Practices: Enable versioning, block public access, use lifecycle rules
Example Usage: module "s3_bucket" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/s3-bucket/aws" version = "3.0.0" bucket = "my-bucket" versioning = { enabled = true } server_side_encryption_configuration = { rule = { apply_server_side_encryption_by_default = { sse_algorithm = "AES256" } } } block_public_access = true }

Keywords: lambda, function, serverless, api, event
Description: Lambda function with IAM role and CloudWatch logs
Use Cases: Serverless APIs, event processing, scheduled tasks
Best Practices: Use layers for dependencies, set appropriate memory/timeout, enable X-Ray
Example Usage: module "lambda" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/lambda/aws" version = "6.0.0" function_name = "my-function" handler = "index.handler" runtime = "nodejs18.x" source_path = "./src" environment_variables = { LOG_LEVEL = "info" } }

Keywords: security, group, firewall, ingress, egress, rules
Description: Security group with predefined rules
Use Cases: Web servers, databases, application firewalls
Best Practices: Use predefined rules, separate SG per service, restrict CIDR blocks
Example Usage: module "security_group" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/security-group/aws" version = "5.0.0" name = "web-sg" vpc_id = module.vpc.vpc_id ingress_rules = ["https-443-tcp", "http-80-tcp"] ingress_cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] egress_rules = ["all-all"] }

Keywords: iam, role, policy, user, permission, identity
Description: IAM roles users and policies
Use Cases: Service roles, cross-account access, CI/CD permissions
Best Practices: Use least privilege, prefer managed policies, use conditions
Example Usage: module "iam_assumable_role" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/iam/aws//modules/iam-assumable-role" version = "5.0.0" create_role = true role_name = "my-role" role_requires_mfa = true trusted_role_arns = ["arn:aws:iam::123456789012:root"] custom_role_policy_arns = ["arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess"] }

Keywords: alb, load, balancer, http, https, routing
Description: Application Load Balancer with listeners and target groups
Input Variables: name, vpc_id, subnets, security_groups, target_groups, http_tcp_listeners, https_listeners
Use Cases: Web applications, API routing, microservices ingress
Best Practices: Use HTTPS listeners, configure health checks, enable WAF
Example Usage: module "alb" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/alb/aws" version = "8.0.0" name = "my-alb" vpc_id = module.vpc.vpc_id subnets = module.vpc.public_subnets security_groups = [module.security_group.security_group_id] target_groups = [{ name = "tg" backend_protocol = "HTTP" backend_port = 80 target_type = "ip" }] }

Keywords: cloudfront, cdn, distribution, cache, edge
Description: CloudFront distribution with origins and behaviors
Use Cases: Static websites, API acceleration, global content delivery
Best Practices: Use OAI for S3, configure cache behaviors, enable WAF
Example Usage: module "cloudfront" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/cloudfront/aws" version = "3.0.0" aliases = ["example.com"] default_root_object = "index.html" origin = { s3 = { domain_name = module.s3_bucket.s3_bucket_bucket_regional_domain_name s3_origin_config = { origin_access_identity = "origin-access-identity/cloudfront/XXXXXX" } } } }

Keywords: acm, certificate, ssl, tls, https
Description: ACM certificate with DNS validation
Use Cases: HTTPS endpoints, ALB certificates, CloudFront SSL
Best Practices: Use DNS validation, include wildcard SANs, set lifecycle
Example Usage: module "acm" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/acm/aws" version = "5.0.0" domain_name = "example.com" zone_id = aws_route53_zone.main.zone_id subject_alternative_names = ["*.example.com"] wait_for_validation = true }

Keywords: vnet, network, azure, subnet, virtual
Description: Azure Virtual Network with subnets
Use Cases: Azure networking, VM infrastructure, AKS networking
Best Practices: Plan address space, use NSGs, configure service endpoints
Example Usage: module "vnet" { source = "Azure/vnet/azurerm" version = "4.0.0" resource_group_name = azurerm_resource_group.main.name vnet_name = "my-vnet" address_space = ["10.0.0.0/16"] subnet_prefixes = ["10.0.1.0/24", "10.0.2.0/24"] subnet_names = ["subnet1", "subnet2"] }

Keywords: aks, kubernetes, k8s, azure, container, managed
Description: Azure Kubernetes Service cluster
Use Cases: Azure Kubernetes, microservices, container workloads
Best Practices: Use managed identity, enable RBAC, configure network policies
Example Usage: module "aks" { source = "Azure/aks/azurerm" version = "7.0.0" resource_group_name = azurerm_resource_group.main.name cluster_name = "my-aks" location = azurerm_resource_group.main.location dns_prefix = "myaks" agents_count = 3 agents_size = "Standard_D2_v2" }

Keywords: vpc, network, gcp, subnet, firewall
Description: GCP VPC network with subnets and firewall rules
Use Cases: GCP networking, GKE networking, VM infrastructure
Best Practices: Use shared VPC for multi-project, configure firewall rules
Example Usage: module "vpc" { source = "terraform-google-modules/network/google" version = "7.0.0" project_id = var.project_id network_name = "my-vpc" subnets = [{ subnet_name = "subnet-01" subnet_ip = "10.0.1.0/24" subnet_region = "us-central1" }] }

Keywords: gke, kubernetes, k8s, google, container, managed
Description: GKE cluster with node pools
Use Cases: GCP Kubernetes, microservices, container workloads
Best Practices: Use private clusters, enable workload identity, configure node auto-provisioning
Example Usage: module "gke" { source = "terraform-google-modules/kubernetes-engine/google" version = "27.0.0" project_id = var.project_id name = "my-gke" region = "us-central1" network = module.vpc.network_name subnetwork = module.vpc.subnets_names[0] ip_range_pods = "pods" ip_range_services = "services" }

Keywords: sql, postgres, mysql, cloudsql, database, managed
Description: Cloud SQL instance with replicas
Use Cases: Managed PostgreSQL/MySQL, production databases
Best Practices: Enable private IP, configure backups, use HA configuration
Example Usage: module "sql-db" { source = "terraform-google-modules/sql-db/google//modules/postgresql" version = "15.0.0" project_id = var.project_id name = "my-db" database_version = "POSTGRES_15" region = "us-central1" tier = "db-f1-micro" }

Keywords: ecr, registry, container, image, docker
Description: ECR repository with lifecycle policies
Use Cases: Container images, CI/CD pipelines, EKS deployments
Best Practices: Enable image scanning, set lifecycle policies, use immutable tags
Example Usage: module "ecr" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/ecr/aws" version = "1.0.0" repository_name = "my-app" repository_lifecycle_policy = jsonencode({ rules = [{ rulePriority = 1 selection = { tagStatus = "untagged" countType = "sinceImagePushed" countUnit = "days" countNumber = 14 } action = { type = "expire" } }] }) }

Keywords: route53, dns, zone, domain, records
Description: Route53 hosted zones and records
Use Cases: DNS management, domain hosting, multi-region routing
Best Practices: Use alias records for AWS resources, configure health checks
Example Usage: module "zones" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/route53/aws//modules/zones" version = "2.0.0" zones = { "example.com" = { comment = "Production zone" } } }

Keywords: sqs, queue, messaging, async, events
Description: SQS queue with DLQ and policies
Use Cases: Message queuing, async processing, decoupling services
Best Practices: Configure DLQ, enable encryption, set visibility timeout
Example Usage: module "sqs" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/sqs/aws" version = "4.0.0" name = "my-queue" message_retention_seconds = 86400 visibility_timeout_seconds = 30 create_dlq = true }

Keywords: kms, encryption, key, security, crypto
Description: KMS key with policies and aliases
Use Cases: Data encryption, secrets encryption, S3/EBS encryption
Best Practices: Enable key rotation, use key policies, set deletion window
Example Usage: module "kms" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/kms/aws" version = "2.0.0" description = "Main encryption key" enable_key_rotation = true deletion_window_in_days = 30 aliases = ["alias/my-key"] }

Keywords: dynamodb, nosql, serverless, table, key-value
Description: DynamoDB table with GSI and autoscaling
Use Cases: Serverless databases, key-value storage, session storage
Best Practices: Enable point-in-time recovery, design for access patterns, use on-demand
Example Usage: module "dynamodb" { source = "terraform-aws-modules/dynamodb-table/aws" version = "3.0.0" name = "my-table" hash_key = "pk" range_key = "sk" billing_mode = "PAY_PER_REQUEST" attributes = [{ name = "pk" type = "S" }, { name = "sk" type = "S" }] }
